Story.Name: Mod_trib_story_gong1
Story.Desc: [NAME] came to [PLACE] and discovered the place where the lightning struck. An ancient cultivator of unfathomable power attempted to ascend beyond the Heavenly Dao itself, but was struck down by a tribulation of unprecedented fury. The corpse still crackles with divine lightning, and the air hums with residual power. There may be treasures beyond imagination to salvage — if one dares approach.

li.OKResult: me:AddMsg(XT("After thinking about it, [NAME] decided not to take any risk and left."));
